title: [RJ01107213] Emilia's PLAYROOM VR
description:
Welcome to Emilia’s Playroom VR!

In this playroom, you will have the opportunity to play with Emilia in a variety of ways in many different places.
After you visit the reception desk, you can enter a door of your choice.
There are more than 8 doors, and each door leads to a different place, transporting you to a new world.
Then, you can choose your favorite place to play.
Play can be viewed freely from various angles.
Instead of having unnatural changes in viewpoint like in 3D modeling tools,
the VR-FPS (first-person shooter) movement system allows you to feel fully immersed, as if you are right there.
You can freely view the play in various ways, as well as by adjusting your view height.
Once you have viewed a scene, you can easily watch it again later by using the scene select function.

You can choose from four different hair and costume colors.
There is also a function to make the male character transparent to make it easier to see the female body.

For those who want to take more time to enjoy the scene, there is also a time stop function.
You can pause and look around from any angle you want.

And there are plans to add more scenes through future free version upgrades!

https://www.dlsite.com/maniax/work/=/product_id/RJ01107213.html

title: [RJ402211] Go for it, Goblin Master! v0.6.0
description:
Game Overview
Top-Down Perspective Action Game x Base Camp Management Simulation Game

Lead your goblins to raid villages and abduct girls as you pillage and plunder!
Endlessly impregnate your victims at the base camp, forcing them to give birth to more and more goblins.
As the number of goblins increases, train them to show the humans just how scary they can be!


Game Details
The raiding portion of this action game is from a top-down perspective.
Instruct your goblin allies to efficiently fight together and find girls.
If you rape the girl you defeated right on the spot, your army's motivation and strength will increase!

Impregnate the girls you bring back to the base camp!
If you cross-breed with a strong goblin, you will get even stronger goblin spawn!
Offspring inherit their parents' skills, so keep on capturing and impregnating girls who have new skill

The base camp preparation phase is command-based!
The base camp can only accommodate one girl at first, but it can be expanded to accommodate more.
Impregnate them all at once and make your army stronger!

There are two endings available.
Breeding Ending: This is unlocked after continuously increasing the number of goblins in your army.
Victory Ending: This is unlocked after defeating the enemy kingdom's knights.

Defeating the knights of the kingdom is a difficult task!


About the Game
* The illustrations in this game were created using AI.

* PC specs must be at a certain level to run 3D games. Please test the operation of this game first through the trial version.

* This is the early access version of the game. The following functions have not yet been implemented despite the information published on Ci-en.

- Various buildings other than the breeding sheds.
(Food pantries, training camps, watchtowers, rest areas, prisoners' quarters, etc.)
- Raids on human bases at regular intervals.
- A map of the castle.
- Unique characters that can be captured and impregnated.
(e.g. The most beautiful woman in the village, the knight commander, and the princess.)
- Gang rape motions.
- Free movement throughout the base.

In addition to the feedback we have received, we plan on creating these features and selling them as DLC.

This work was created partially with AI.
(English product description provided by the creator.)

title: [RJ01093769] Lustful Spirit Hunt
description:
Note:- Please check Demo version before purchasing game. English users, change text size in option menu from 70 to 100.

In this game you play as Ted/Taichi who has just begun his ghost hunting adventures. Together with your assistant Luna/Tsukiko catch all those nasty ghost before they hunt you.

Gameplay:-
You have to capture ghost on the site you are currently investigating. Use tool at your disposal to find 3 out 7 evidences ghost produce. Then understand it's behaviour and use correct tool to weaken it. Once the ghost is down you must have sex with it to capture it. For more information, check 'How To Play' section in pause menu.

Current Content:-
1) Ghosts :- There are 11 ghost you can catch in current update. Each ghost have different evidences or behaviours.
2) Contract :- There are 5 contract you can unlock.
3) Recruits :- There are 5 recruits that can be found in various levels. Each recruits give you different buffs.
4) Collectibles :- Open journal by pressing 'escape' or 'Tab' and go to collectible section for more info.

Language Support:- Game currently support English and Japanese (Machine Translate). It can be manually change by editing csv files in Streaming Assets folder of game.

Cheats:-
whatareyou – reveals ghost name.
whereareyou – reveals ghost location.
runner – increase movement and no stamina consumption.
fuckyou – begins hunt regardless of fear meter and time.
lovemaker – increase climax speed by 300%.

title: [TVC] [Lilith Soft] 反抗的なヤンキー少女との絶対主従関係
description:
![Cover](https://i.ibb.co/Fs7jksF/RJ01112711-img-main.webp)


Like with the latest remake they made, this time they used Unity3D, although this time it's pretty clear that they are now pretty much used to it, since the performance is miles better than before, and that's without taking into consideration the gallery viewer is designed much better.

I made sure to also include a complete save for those CG-only users, but for those who want to enjoy the story, it's pretty straightforward, since there are only 4 moments where the player has an option to make.

By the way, when running the game, do NOT run the game through a Virtual Machine. While this crack bypasses the PlayDRM check, which by all means it won't allow the game to run on a VM, the game might still for some reason still not play properly through the VM.

Contact me: https://discord.gg/fjZKJJUWw4
